idea-plugin.name: Islands Light with Test-Aware Tabs
idea-plugin.description: Islands Light fork with two test-file aids: the file in the active editor tab gets the IDE's Tests scope icon (red/green triangles) when it lives in a test source root — inactive tabs keep their regular icons — and the active tab's island fill is translucent so a test file's scope color shows through. Based on JetBrains' Islands Light theme (Apache 2.0).
